channel.title: The Psychology Files
channel.description: Exploring the hidden mechanics of the human mind. Every episode we dive deep into psychology, behaviour, and the mental patterns that shape who we are.
channel.itunes:author: The Psychology Files

item.title: Can Trauma Actually Make You Stronger? The Science Says...
item.description: 70% of trauma survivors report positive life changes from their suffering. We explore the neuroscience of post-traumatic growth and why some people emerge stronger from adversity while others don't.

item.title: Your Sadness Isn't Depression (But How Do You Know?)
item.description: Robin Williams was cracking jokes weeks before his suicide - revealing the dangerous gap between how we think depression looks and its brutal reality.

item.title: Your Brain on Junk Food: How Big Food Hijacks Your Mind
item.description: Ultra-processed foods trigger the same addiction pathways as cocaine, and food companies know it. Discover the dark psychology tactics used to hijack your brain's reward system.
